source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium typography system, editorial SaaS landing page, black-white developer SaaS, white luxury editorial page, portfolio editorial dark page, high-end product homepage
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

Visual traits:
- separate display and body fonts
- very large tight hero type
- short memorable headline lines
- restrained paragraph widths
- editorial whitespace
- asymmetric desktop composition

Use when:
- premium typography system
- editorial SaaS landing page
- black-white developer SaaS
- white luxury editorial page
- portfolio editorial dark page
- high-end product homepage

Avoid when:
- default font-bold hero
- paragraphs stretched too wide
- same heading size across all sections
- weak hierarchy
- over-centered every section
- desktop type scale forced onto mobile

AI summary: Premium typography and layout rules: use display/body font pairing, very large tight hero type, short memorable lines, body copy max-width 32ch-64ch, editorial whitespace, asymmetry, and responsive clamp/vw sizing. Avoid default bold SaaS headings and wide paragraphs.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium typography system, editorial SaaS landing page, black-white developer SaaS, white luxury editorial page, portfolio editorial dark page, high-end product homepage
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Use display/body pairings such as Instrument Serif italic + Inter, Instrument Serif italic + Barlow, Readex Pro, Inter, or Geist + Inter.
- Hero title line-height should be 0.8 to 0.95 with letter-spacing -0.02em to -0.05em.
- Hero font-weight should usually be 400 to 500, not default bold.
- Section headings should use text-4xl to text-6xl with tight line-height.
- Body copy should stay small but readable, with max-width around 32ch to 64ch.
- On desktop, use asymmetry, scale contrast, and whitespace instead of filling every area.

AI summary: Premium typography and layout rules: use display/body font pairing, very large tight hero type, short memorable lines, body copy max-width 32ch-64ch, editorial whitespace, asymmetry, and responsive clamp/vw sizing. Avoid default bold SaaS headings and wide paragraphs.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium typography system, editorial SaaS landing page, black-white developer SaaS, white luxury editorial page, portfolio editorial dark page, high-end product homepage
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Do not make display type so tight that letters collide on mobile.
- Keep paragraph widths readable.
- Avoid low-contrast gray copy on dark or glass backgrounds.
- Do not rely only on decorative serif styling for hierarchy.
- Check long words and mixed English/Chinese line wrapping.

AI summary: Premium typography and layout rules: use display/body font pairing, very large tight hero type, short memorable lines, body copy max-width 32ch-64ch, editorial whitespace, asymmetry, and responsive clamp/vw sizing. Avoid default bold SaaS headings and wide paragraphs.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium typography system, editorial SaaS landing page, black-white developer SaaS, white luxury editorial page, portfolio editorial dark page, high-end product homepage
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Hero heading scale: text-5xl -> md:text-7xl -> lg:text-[5.5rem].
- Giant type scale: text-[14vw] md:text-[13vw].
- Section heading scale: text-4xl -> md:text-5xl -> lg:text-6xl.
- Use clamp() or viewport units for huge type and test mobile overflow.
- Use max-width utilities for body copy and avoid full-width paragraphs.
- Use Geist + Inter for developer SaaS; use serif italic pairing for luxury/editorial contrast.

AI summary: Premium typography and layout rules: use display/body font pairing, very large tight hero type, short memorable lines, body copy max-width 32ch-64ch, editorial whitespace, asymmetry, and responsive clamp/vw sizing. Avoid default bold SaaS headings and wide paragraphs.
